import React from 'react' import PropTypes from 'prop-types' import navIcon1 from '../assets/img/nav-icon1.svg'; import navIcon2 from '../assets/img/nav-icon2.svg'; import navIcon3 from '../assets/img/nav-icon3.svg'; // import { HashLink } from 'react-router-hash-link'; export default function Navbar(props) { return ( <>
{props.title}
  • Home
  • {props.getintouch}
  • {props.aboutText}
) } Navbar.prototype={ title:PropTypes.string.isrequired, videos:PropTypes.string.isRequired } Navbar.defaultProps={ title:"Alan.is", getintouch:"Get in Touch", aboutText:"About me" };
